name: Corn and Zucchini Muffins from Bob Hogan
recipeIngredient: 2 large Egg whites or 1 each egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Spray the bottoms only of 12 medium muffin cups, 2 1/2 inches x 1 1/4 inches with nonstick cooking spray or line them with paper baking cups.
3. In a medium bowl, beat together milk, oil, and egg whites (or 1 each egg). Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Fold in shredded zucchini and cooked whole kernel corn until combined.
5. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups, filling them quite full.
6. Bake for 22 to 24 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from the pan.
